description: Agent team configuration for EHS AI Platform. This file is documentation only — it does not configure Claude Code directly. Agents are invoked via slash commands in .claude/commands/. Read CLAUDE.md and planning.md before starting any agent.

pre_agent_phase.note: Web crawling (Step 0) and ingestion experiments (Step 1) must complete before any agent is invoked. Agents have nothing to work with until real documents exist and Plan/infra/schema.md is written.

phase_2.run: parallel — both start once Plan/infra/api_contract.md exists
phase_2.gate: Plan/infra/api_contract.md must exist before either agent starts
phase_2.note: Each agent marks their half done in their own progress.md. Full e2e verify is Step 10c.

phase_3.run: sequential — starts after phase 2 agents both signal done
phase_3.gate: Plan/backend/progress.md and Plan/frontend/progress.md both show steps 4-8 complete

frontend.note: Build against mocks first. Swap to real API calls only after Plan/backend/progress.md shows steps 4-8 complete.
